pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 21.
Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.4.1 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Convert the project from a single module to a multi-module Maven project with a parent POM.
Move dependency version management to the parent POM using dependencyManagement.
Upgrade AssertJ to version 3.27.3 compatible with newer Java versions.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to 3.5.2 for better Java 21 test execution support.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add Coveralls Maven plugin for continuous integration coverage reporting.
Add Flatten Maven plugin to handle multi-module release POMs correctly.
Remove Guava dependency which was likely used for utilities now available in Java 21 or replaced.
Remove old JUnit 4 dependency in favor of JUnit 5 (implied by Spring Boot 3/Surefire 3 upgrade).
Add project metadata such as name, description, URL, licenses, and SCM information.
pom.xml.human_impl:
<name>friendly id</name>
<description>Library to convert uuid to url friendly IDs basing on base62</description>
<url>https://github.com/Devskiller/friendly-id</url>

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Sonatype Nexus repositories for snapshot and release distribution.
Add CI management and issue management metadata to the POM.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the Maven Versions Plugin backup file to .gitignore to prevent committing generated artifacts.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.4 to support newer distribution types and security features.
Switch Maven distribution type to 'only-script' to download only the necessary scripts rather than the full binary archive.
Upgrade the underlying Apache Maven version from 3.5.0 to 3.9.11 to ensure compatibility with modern build requirements and JDK 21.
Remove executable permission from the Maven wrapper properties file as it is a configuration file, not a script.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper shell script with the modern version 3.3.4 to support newer Maven features and improved cross-platform compatibility.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced entire content of mvnw with Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper batch script with the modern version 3.3.4 implementation that uses PowerShell for cross-platform compatibility and improved distribution handling.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced entire content of mvnw.cmd with new script starting with '<# : batch portion' and 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4'

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Remove the executable permission bit from the Windows batch file, as it is not required for execution on Windows and is often considered a cosmetic artifact in cross-platform repos.
